zh.St Andrew's Church, Shalford, Essex, Eng: 英國艾可沙爾福德聖 安德也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: William Allgar於大約1530年出生在英國艾可沙爾福德。他與Margaret在英國艾可沙爾福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1575年8月1日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.St Andrew's Church, Shalford, Essex, Eng: 英国艾可沙爾福德聖 安德也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Allgar于大约1530年出生在英国艾可沙爾福德。他与Margaret在英国艾可沙爾福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1575年8月1日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Allgar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Algar
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Algar, representing the falling together of two Old English names, Ælfgār and Æthelgār, composed of the elements respectively ælf ‘elf’ or æthel ‘noble’ + gār ‘spear’. It could also be from the much rarer Old English personal name Ealdgār, composed of elements meaning ‘old’ + ‘spear’. In East Anglia, it is more probably a variant of Alger (Old Norse Álfgeirr). See also Agar , Elgar .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: William Allgar was born about 1530, in Shalford, Essex, England. He married Margaret in Shalford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1 August 1575, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Shalford, Essex, England.

ja.St Andrew's Church, Shalford, Essex, Eng: イギリスエセックスシャルフォードスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: William Allgarは約1530年にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードで生まれた。イギリスエセックスシャルフォードでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1575年8月1日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスシャルフォードスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Shalford, Essex, Eng: 영국 에세스 샤퍼드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Allgar(은)는 대략 1530년 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 태어났다. 그는 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1575년 8월 1일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1 августа 1575 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.
